headline: AMGEN ANNOUNCES 2026 SECOND QUARTER DIVIDEND
summary: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a $2.52 per share dividend for the second quarter of 2026. The dividend will be paid on June 5, 2026, to all stockholders of record as of the close of business on May 15, 2026.
